name: @firstpick/pi-skill-tauri-django-react
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for Tauri + Django + React desktop apps, especially backend lifecycle, CORS/auth, frontend integration, build packaging, dual desktop/web deployment, Rust commands, and platform-specific gotchas.
description_zh: 代理应为此技能调用，用于 Tauri + Django + React 桌面应用，特别是后端生命周期、CORS/认证、前端集成、构建打包、双桌面/Web 部署、Rust 命令和平台特定注意事项
